mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, nickname, role, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) FROM recipes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, title, title_image AS titleImage, is_public AS isPublic, like_count AS likeCount, comment_count AS commentCount FROM recipes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.title_image AS titleImage, r.cooking_time AS cookingTime, r.like_count AS likeCount, r.comment_count AS commentCount, d.name AS difficultyName FROM recipe_likes rl JOIN recipes r ON rl.recipe_id = r.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id WHERE rl.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY rl.created_at DESC
